note: Added 'ssn = Regex(r"\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}")' right after the isbn block at the end of file, with a one-line comment. Verified import + basic match/non-match. patch.txt written.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Added 'hash_sha256 = Regex(r"[a-fA-F0-9]{64}")' right after the isbn block at the end of file, with a one-line comment. Verified matching (valid 64-char hex in any case, invalid lengths/chars/empty rejected), pydantic model integration, and JSON schema generation. patch.txt written.
